Speaker: Woman
Text: You've got Sears Roebuck in Denver, Colorado, and I don't have, uhh... a telephone number for Tel Aviv.

Speaker: Woman
Text: Ah, my towels are all solid. They have nothing on them.

Speaker: Woman
Text: The body sheets would be big enough to wrap a chimp in.

Speaker: Woman
Text: Everything is... is more of the cotton with a loop on it, and it is softer than the burlap bag.

Speaker: Woman
Text: I couldn't make you into a loop.

Speaker: Woman
Text: I don't have anything with giraffe.

Speaker: Woman
Text: I... I'm not sure that we're talking the same language.
